## Meeting Purpose

[Handover of all marketing systems, accounts, and assets from Poise to Deep Gram](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Gained access to critical marketing tools: Webflow, Customer.io, Intercom, social channels, analytics platforms](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Backed up 200K+ email list from Customer.io before potential deletion](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Identified remaining access needs: Figma design files, freelance designer contact](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Next steps to announce Poise acquisition and transition marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)

## Topics

### Website (Webflow)

  - [Gained admin access to edit Webflow website](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Redirects logged-in users from poise.com to app.poise.com](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Contact forms go to email, may integrate with Intercom](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Need to transfer site ownership to upgrade editor seats](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### Email Marketing (Customer.io)

  - [200K+ emails in Customer.io, backed up export](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Reviewing costs, may migrate to HubSpot gradually](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Need to warm up new domain before emailing full list](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)

### Social Media

  - [Access needed for Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=2189.0)
  - [Google Ads access also needed](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=2189.0)

### Analytics

  - [Given admin access to Google Analytics, Tag Manager, Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=2477.0)
  - [Using Amplitude heavily, with Heap also embedded](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=2363.0)
  - [May revisit using Segment for identity resolution](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=2950.0)

### Design Assets

  - [Figma used for design system, brand assets](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=3210.0)
  - [Freelance designer Adnan (Bosnia) did web design](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=3446.0)
  - [Access to video assets, content folders needed](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=3325.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vicky to share access to remaining social, ads, design accounts](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [Review and send acquisition email to Customer.io list](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [Coordinate marketing announcement across channels](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=2288.0)
  - [Migrate marketing tools/data to Deep Gram platforms gradually](https://fathom.video/share/65ZXNsBc-NKQ7LxBWR9rUpHwtG-LqaXA?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
